description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building with a modernist facade, featuring a grid of evenly spaced windows running vertically and horizontally across its main tower. The structure is composed of a prominent high-rise section and a lower, sprawling podium with additional annexes and rooftop structures. The main tower is clad in reflective glass and light-colored panels, while the podium and annexes display a mix of brick and concrete finishes. The building sits on a series of columns at the base, creating a partially open ground level. There are visible commercial storefronts and signage on the lower levels, indicating mixed-use functionality. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, characteristic of mid-to-late 20th-century urban office architecture.
description: A tall, modernist office building with a glass and panel facade, featuring a high-rise tower atop a lower podium with commercial storefronts and annexes.
description_view_0: This view highlights the building's tall tower, the column-supported base, and the attached lower podium with annexes extending to the rear.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the brick and concrete annexes, rooftop structures, and the less prominent side of the main tower.
description_view_2: From above and behind, the complex layout of the podium and annexes is visible, with various rooftop elements and a narrow profile of the tower.
description_view_3: The front view displays the main glass facade, commercial signage, and the column-supported entrance area, emphasizing the building's height and regular window grid.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular vertical and horizontal grid of rectangular windows, evenly spaced and repeated across the facade.
attribute_building_entrance_type: recessed entry with double glass doors
